title: Frozen Death Flightknife
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Frozen Death Flightknife''' was a unit of [[Blade-32 superiority fighter|Blade-32 Beta superiority fighters]] in the [[Adumari Union]]'s air force. It fought in the [[Battle of Adumar]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], and played an important role in the combined Adumari/[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] force's attack on the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Agonizer (starship)|''Agonizer'']]. In coordinated missile attacks with two other Blade-32 [[Flightknife|flightknives]] and a New Republic [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] squadron, the fighters of Frozen Death managed to break through the ''Agonizer''{{'s}} shields and caused substantial hull damage, forcing the Star Destroyer to retreat.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''
